ab: Yaku mi tama mu pa musa nami qmita swayi snaw tama mu ka ciwa.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Mluqah qaqay na ka swayi snaw tama mu da.
Rmngaw yami ka hiya, mpuruq kingal bling ka dnamux sapah da.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Wisu smmalu dnamux sapah ka hiya cida pa, peyyah dnamux sapah tburuq ka hiya da.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Madas hiyi dapa mi bingro ka tama subway na swayi tama.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Pprngaw nami kari mniq cka tqiyan ka swayi snaw tama, snrnu ou bay pnngalan kari ka hiya.
ch: 我和叔叔在房間裡聊天，他分享了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Smwayay ku brah cida hay, tndahu rmngaw yaku wada ku mdakil da mi, wada ku msediq balay uri da nchaya ka swayi snaw tama.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Rmngaw ku ka yaku, “Tmawa malu ka qaqay swayi snaw tama daw, iyah tuhuy sapah nami nduray uri.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
